description:
Khám Phá Kỳ Nghỉ Tuyệt Vời tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Nằm giữa vẻ đẹp hoang sơ của đảo Sonaisali, Nadi, Fiji, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp với không gian sang trọng và dịch vụ tận tâm. Khách sạn mở cửa từ 3 giờ chiều để check-in, cho phép bạn bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của mình một cách thoải mái và dễ chịu sau hành trình dài. Đến chiều hôm sau, bạn có thể dễ dàng trả phòng trước 11 giờ sáng để bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng.

DoubleTree Resort đặc biệt thân thiện với gia đình, khi cho phép trẻ em từ 3 đến 17 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, giúp các gia đình có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn mà không lo lắng về chi phí thêm. Với nhiều phòng nghỉ rộng rãi, tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chu đáo, đây là điểm đến lý tưởng để thư giãn, khám phá và tạo nên những ký ức đẹp bên người thân yêu của bạn.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island, du khách sẽ được thưởng thức các tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng nhằm mang lại trải nghiệm thư giãn và vui vẻ tối đa trong kỳ nghỉ của mình. Quầy bar sang trọng là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức các loại cocktail độc đáo, đồ uống mát lạnh và thư giãn bên bạn bè hoặc người thân trong không gian thoải mái, ấm cúng. Ngoài ra, khu spa cao cấp mang đến dịch vụ chăm sóc sức khỏe và làm đẹp chuyên nghiệp, giúp du khách xua tan mệt mỏi, tái tạo năng lượng sau những hoạt động vui chơi trên đảo.
Đặc biệt, khách lưu trú còn có thể khám phá các món quà lưu niệm độc đáo tại cửa hàng quà tặng, giúp lưu giữ những kỷ niệm đẹp của chuyến đi hoặc làm quà tặng ý nghĩa cho người thân. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo của các tiện ích giải trí này, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji mang đến một không gian nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng, nơi mọi khoảnh khắc đều trở nên đặc biệt và khó quên.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island, du khách không chỉ tận hưởng vẻ đẹp thiên nhiên tuyệt mỹ mà còn có cơ hội trải nghiệm các hoạt động thể thao đa dạng. Khu sân tennis ngoài trời hiện đại, được duy trì tốt, mang đến không gian lý tưởng để chơi tennis cùng bạn bè hoặc thư giãn sau những giờ phút làm việc căng thẳng. Đặc biệt, sân tennis mở ra khung cảnh thiên nhiên trong lành, giúp bạn thả lỏng tinh thần và rèn luyện thể chất một cách vui vẻ và thoải mái.

Bên cạnh đó, hồ bơi ngoài trời rộng lớn là điểm đến lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng ánh nắng Fiji trong lành. Bạn có thể thả mình trong làn nước mát mẻ, hoặc tham gia các hoạt động bơi lội để giữ gìn sức khỏe và nâng cao thể lực. Với các tiện nghi thể thao đẳng cấp, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo, kết hợp giữa thư giãn và hoạt động thể thao để du khách có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Khách còn có thể yên tâm về việc lưu trữ hành lý tại khách sạn, giúp bạn dễ dàng di chuyển và khám phá đảo mà không phải lo lắng về hành lý. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo không gian nghỉ ngơi của bạn luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng và thoáng đãng sau mỗi ngày khám phá. Với các tiện nghi này, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island cam kết mang đến cho khách trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo, tiện nghi và thoải mái nhất trong mọi khía cạnh của chuyến đi.

Tiện Nghi Giao Thông Đa Dạng Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm các tiện ích giao thông đa dạng để thuận tiện trong việc khám phá đảo và nghỉ dưỡng. Resort cung cấp các tour du lịch hấp dẫn, giúp khách hàng khám phá vẻ đẹp hoang sơ của đảo Sonaisali một cách dễ dàng và tiện lợi. Đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện luôn sẵn sàng tư vấn và tổ chức các chuyến tham quan theo yêu cầu của khách, mang lại những trải nghiệm khó quên trong hành trình của bạn.

Ngoài ra, resort còn có hệ thống bãi đỗ xe tại chỗ rộng rãi và an toàn, giúp du khách yên tâm về phương tiện của mình trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Với các tiện ích giao thông này, khách lưu trú tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji có thể dễ dàng di chuyển, khám phá các điểm đến nổi bật của đảo và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn mà không lo lắng về phương tiện đi lại.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Đẳng Cấp tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm các tiện nghi phòng nghỉ cao cấp nhằm mang lại sự thoải mái tối đa trong kỳ nghỉ của mình. Các phòng được trang bị áo choàng tắm sang trọng và máy sấy tóc hiện đại, giúp bạn cảm thấy thư giãn như đang ở nhà. Đặc biệt, mỗi phòng còn có truyền hình và hệ thống phim trong nhà, mang đến những phút giây giải trí thú vị sau một ngày dài khám phá đảo quốc xinh đẹp này.

Ngoài ra, các tiện nghi như minibar, bàn trà nhỏ và ban công hoặc sân thượng riêng biệt tạo điều kiện lý tưởng để thư giãn và ngắm nhìn cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp xung quanh. Du khách còn được cung cấp đầy đủ các sản phẩm vệ sinh cá nhân, cùng với trà miễn phí để thưởng thức mỗi buổi sáng, giúp bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng và sảng khoái.

Trải Nghiệm Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island, du khách sẽ được thưởng thức một loạt các trải nghiệm ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú. Nhà hàng của khu nghỉ dưỡng mang đến các món ăn ngon miệng, từ các đặc sản địa phương đến các món quốc tế tinh tế, phù hợp cho mọi khẩu vị. Bên cạnh đó, dịch vụ phòng 24/7 cho phép khách hàng thưởng thức những món ăn yêu thích ngay tại phòng riêng, mang lại sự tiện lợi và thoải mái tối đa trong suối nghỉ dưỡng của mình.

Ngoài ra, resort còn trang bị các tiện nghi BBQ hiện đại, lý tưởng cho những buổi tiệc nướng ngoài trời cùng gia đình và bạn bè. Khách còn có thể bắt đầu ngày mới với bữa sáng buffet phong phú và hấp dẫn, được chuẩn bị kỹ lưỡng để đáp ứng mọi sở thích. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo mọi không gian luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, tạo cảm giác dễ chịu và thư thái tối đa cho khách trong suỗi kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Khám Phá Các Loại Phòng Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn về phòng để phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Các phòng như Phòng Khách Double Queen Beachfront với ban công, rộng 45 mét vuông, mang đến không gian thoải mái với hai giường Queen, lý tưởng cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn. Ngoài ra, các loại phòng như King Premium Ocean View Bure, Double King Premium Ocean View Bure, Double King Ocean View Bure và King Ocean View Bure đều có diện tích khoảng 46 mét vuông, cung cấp các lựa chọn từ một đến hai giường King, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp với tầm nhìn ra đại dương tuyệt đẹp.

Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn không chỉ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất mà còn trải nghiệm quá trình đặt phòng nhanh chóng, dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối. Việc này giúp bạn tập trung vào việc chuẩn bị cho kỳ nghỉ của mình một cách thoải mái và yên tâm, để tận hưởng mọi khoảnh khắc tuyệt vời tại thiên đường Fiji.

Khám Phá Đảo Sonaisali - Thiên Đường Bình Yên Trong Lòng Nadi, Fiji

Đảo Sonaisali là một viên ngọc quý nằm trong lòng thành phố Nadi, Fiji, nổi bật với vẻ đẹp hoang sơ, bãi biển cát trắng mịn màng và làn nước trong xanh tuyệt đẹp. Nơi đây mang đến cảm giác yên bình, lý tưởng để thư giãn và tránh xa nhịp sống hối hả của cuộc sống hàng ngày. Với khung cảnh thiên nhiên tươi đẹp, đảo Sonaisali còn là điểm đến lý tưởng để tham gia các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước như lặn biển, lướt sóng hoặc chèo thuyền kayak, mang lại trải nghiệm khó quên cho du khách. Không chỉ có vậy, khu vực xung quanh còn có những làng chài truyền thống, nơi du khách có thể tìm hiểu về văn hóa đặc sắc của người Fiji và thưởng thức các món ăn địa phương hấp dẫn.

Với vị trí thuận tiện gần trung tâm Nadi, đảo Sonaisali còn là điểm dừng chân lý tưởng để khám phá các địa danh nổi tiếng khác của Fiji như Vịnh Denarau, các khu resort sang trọng và các khu bảo tồn sinh thái phong phú. Khi đêm xuống, khung cảnh xung quanh biến thành một bức tranh lung linh, huyền ảo với ánh đèn lung linh phản chiếu trên mặt nước. Dù bạn muốn tận hưởng những ngày nghỉ yên bình hay khám phá văn hóa độc đáo của Fiji, đảo Sonaisali chính là nơi lý tưởng để tạo nên những ký ức khó quên trong hành trình của mình.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đến DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Đảo Sonaisali

Từ Sân bay Quốc tế Nadi, du khách chỉ mất khoảng 30 đến 40 phút lái xe để đến với DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Đảo Sonaisali. Khi vừa rời khỏi sân bay, bạn có thể dễ dàng thuê xe taxi hoặc đặt dịch vụ đưa đón riêng để có hành trình thoải mái và tiện lợi. Các tài xế địa phương thân thiện sẽ giúp bạn đi qua những cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp của vùng đất Fiji, đưa bạn đến cổng resort một cách an toàn và nhanh chóng.

Ngoài ra, nhiều khách sạn và dịch vụ du lịch tại Nadi còn cung cấp các dịch vụ đưa đón riêng, giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong hành trình. Từ trung tâm Nadi hoặc các điểm du lịch gần đó, chỉ cần đặt trước, bạn sẽ được đón tiếp nồng hậu và đưa đến resort bằng xe riêng sang trọng, đảm bảo chuyến đi của bạn bắt đầu một cách thuận tiện và dễ dàng. Với vị trí lý tưởng này, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Đảo Sonaisali là điểm đến lý tưởng để thư giãn và khám phá vẻ đẹp hoang sơ của đảo quốc Fiji.

Những nhà hàng nổi bật quanh DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Khi lưu trú tại DoubleTree Resort, du khách còn có cơ hội thưởng thức ẩm thực đa dạng tại các nhà hàng nổi bật gần đó. Sunny Pizza Nawaicoba mang đến những chiếc pizza thơm ngon, phù hợp cho cả gia đình và nhóm bạn. Vulani Restaurant nổi bật với các món ăn truyền thống Fiji và hải sản tươi sống, mang lại trải nghiệm ẩm thực địa phương đích thực. Tavu Bar and Grill là điểm đến lý tưởng để thưởng thức các món nướng hấp dẫn trong không gian thoáng đãng, lý tưởng cho buổi tối thư giãn. Pillay's BBQ nổi bật với các món BBQ đậm đà, phù hợp cho những buổi tụ họp thân mật. Shozil cung cấp các món ăn đa dạng từ châu Á, phù hợp với những ai yêu thích ẩm thực quốc tế. Cuối cùng, Noodle Story mang đến các món mì và món ăn nhẹ phong phú, là lựa chọn tuyệt vời để thưởng thức nhanh chóng sau một ngày khám phá đảo.

Giá Phòng Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island So Với Trung Bình Thành Phố Nadi

DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island nổi bật với mức giá phòng trung bình từ 251 đến 300 USD, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng cao cấp và đẳng cấp cho du khách. So với mức giá trung bình của các khách sạn khác trong thành phố Nadi, chỉ từ 101 đến 150 USD, resort này thực sự là một lựa chọn phù hợp cho những ai muốn tận hưởng dịch vụ sang trọng cùng không gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời trên đảo. Mức giá cao hơn này phản ánh chất lượng dịch vụ, tiện nghi đẳng cấp và vị trí đắc địa của resort, mang lại giá trị xứng đáng cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn.

Đánh giá tích cực về DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

Khách hàng đều dành lời khen ngợi về vị trí đẹp mê hoặc của resort, mang đến cảm giác thư thái và yên bình ngay từ lần đầu tiên đặt chân đến. Các dịch vụ tại đây như lễ tân, nhà hàng và các hoạt động giải trí đều được đánh giá cao, mang lại trải nghiệm tuyệt vời và khiến du khách cảm thấy được chào đón nồng nhiệt. Các phòng nghỉ rộng rãi, đẹp mắt cùng với các món ăn ngon, đặc biệt là các ưu đãi đặc biệt của nhà hàng, đã làm hài lòng mọi thực khách.

Điểm nhấn nổi bật là hồ bơi lagoon tuyệt đẹp, phù hợp cho cả gia đình với khu vực dành riêng cho trẻ em và quầy bar cạnh hồ bơi cho người lớn, tạo nên không gian vui chơi và thư giãn lý tưởng. Đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình và luôn làm khách cảm thấy như ở nhà, khiến họ muốn quay lại lần nữa. Với cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp, không khí thân thiện và dịch vụ xuất sắc, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji là điểm đến lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn tại Fiji.

Đánh giá tích cực về DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island

DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji, Sonaisali Island nổi bật với mức đánh giá tổng thể ấn tượng 8.2 điểm, phản ánh chất lượng dịch vụ và trải nghiệm tuyệt vời mà khách hàng cảm nhận được. Khách sạn không chỉ sở hữu các tiện nghi hiện đại và sạch sẽ, đạt điểm 8.0 và 8.5 về cơ sở vật chất và vệ sinh, mà còn mang lại cảm giác thoải mái và an tâm cho mọi du khách. Đặc biệt, đội ngũ nhân viên tại đây luôn thể hiện sự chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm, ghi điểm cao với điểm số 8.8, góp phần tạo nên một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại đảo Sonaisali.

Với vị trí thuận tiện, khách hàng vẫn cảm thấy hài lòng mặc dù điểm số 7.7 về địa điểm không quá cao, nhưng bù lại, dịch vụ khách sạn đã vượt mong đợi với giá trị tốt, đạt 7.8 điểm. Từ sự chăm sóc chu đáo của nhân viên đến các tiện ích đa dạng, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Fiji mang đến một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng cho những ai tìm kiếm sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa thiên nhiên tươi đẹp và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Trong một môi trường phong phú về thiên nhiên, tôi thực sự cảm nhận được vẻ đẹp của nam Thái Bình Dương. Việc đi qua giữa đảo chính và khách sạn bằng chiếc thuyền nhỏ thuộc sở hữu của khách sạn mang lại cảm giác đặc biệt hơn. Các nhân viên luôn nở nụ cười, rất thân thiện và tốt bụng. Hồ bơi cũng rộng rãi, và trẻ em có vẻ rất vui vẻ chơi đùa suốt cả ngày. Những căn phòng trong các tòa nhà độc lập được trang trí gọn gàng, và tôi đã thưởng thức cảnh hoàng hôn trong khi đứng trên boong và cảm nhận gió biển. Tổng thể tôi rất hài lòng.
sample_comments.title: Thái Bình Dương miền Nam mơ ước
sample_comments.room_type: Double King Premium Ocean View Bure

sample_comments.title: It was good
sample_comments.positives: Tavu Restaurant was great
sample_comments.negatives: paid for things that we didnt request

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: All of it - the warm and helpful staff, the beautuful hut accommodations, the AMAZING food. I just can't say enough. It was a wonderful place to visit!
sample_comments.negatives: The access into the pools could be better for those who are unsure on their feet - like handrails and smaller steps into the main pool area in more than one place.

sample_comments.text:
Tôi đã ở lại đây với tư cách là một khách du lịch độc lập và tổng thể đã có một trải nghiệm thư giãn và đáng nhớ. Khu nghỉ dưỡng thật đẹp, yên bình và hoàn hảo nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và chậm lại trong vài ngày. Nhân viên thì ấm áp và thân thiện, và tôi luôn cảm thấy thoải mái xung quanh khu nghỉ dưỡng.

Bữa sáng buffet mỗi sáng thật tuyệt vời, và tôi thích dành những ngày của mình bên nước, tận hưởng các liệu pháp massage và đơn giản là thư giãn. Khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng giúp dễ dàng tổ chức các hoạt động và phương tiện di chuyển khi cần.

Các phòng đều thoải mái và bầu không khí xung quanh khu nghỉ dưỡng thì yên tĩnh và nhiệt đới, đúng những gì tôi cần cho một chuyến đi tạm lánh.

Tôi đặc biệt khuyên bạn nên đến khu nghỉ dưỡng này nếu bạn muốn có một trải nghiệm Fiji thoải mái hơn, tránh xa những khu vực du lịch đông đúc.

Cảm ơn bạn đã cho tôi một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời
sample_comments.title: Một trải nghiệm khu nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời ở Fiji
good place to relax and read a book
sample_comments.positives: nice staff, quiet resort
sample_comments.negatives: nothing particular

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Beachfront room.. beautiful. Exceeded expectations
sample_comments.negatives: The only way to get there is by boat but it was quick and complimentary

sample_comments.text: Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn ở một khu nghỉ dưỡng bên bờ biển, đây là một khách sạn tốt. Biển ở đây chỉ ở mức độ như Shonan hoặc hơi kém hơn một chút, vì vậy chỉ có bể bơi. Không thể bơi ở biển. Nếu bạn muốn bơi ở biển đẹp, bạn nên đến một đảo. Nếu trời quang đãng, bạn có thể ngắm nhìn bầu trời đầy sao với chòm sao Nam Thập Tự. Vào buổi tối, nếu giảm bớt đèn đường một chút thì sẽ tốt hơn. Tôi đã đến đây vào tháng 9, cảm giác như đang đi nghỉ mát ở Fiji từ Nhật Bản, rất thoải mái. Nắng rất mạnh nhưng trong bóng râm thì mát mẻ và dễ chịu. Món ăn ở đây có lượng lớn nên những người ăn ít nên chia sẻ nhau. Vị thì bình thường.
sample_comments.title: Khu nghỉ dưỡng
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Wonderful mini resort feel with lots of great amenities
sample_comments.positives: We thoroughly enjoyed everything about the property from the beautiful room with ocean view, great restaurant, fantastic pool with swim up bar and all the fabulous amenities that are included in the room cost. The entire staff gies to great lengths to make your stay perfect!
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing not to like

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful set up and area. Room was accommodating and met our needs
sample_comments.negatives: The service for a Hilton property was subpar. We didn't have anyone refresh our room (clean towels and pick up room service tray). We ordered room service and only received part of the order... charged for what we got, same at beach bar 2nd day.

sample_comments.text: Tại sân bay Nadi, đi taxi mất 30 phút và đi tàu mất 3 phút, tàu chạy 24 giờ miễn phí. Khách sạn lớn và sạch sẽ, nhân viên rất thân thiện. Hồ bơi vô cực rất đẹp, môi trường xung quanh cũng tiếp giáp với biển nên rất đẹp. Tuy nhiên, không có điều kiện để bơi lội trong biển. Nhà hàng trong khách sạn có thể thưởng thức bữa ăn với giá cả hợp lý. Tuy nhiên, giao thông từ sân bay và các cơ sở dịch vụ như nhà hàng xung quanh hoàn toàn không có, điều này hơi tiếc nuối. Nhưng khách sạn thì rất thân thiện và sạch sẽ, tôi rất hài lòng.
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn tuyệt nhất cho chuyến du lịch gia đình.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Very dirty
sample_comments.text: The resort was very dirty. It looks so run down. Aircon was not working properly. Very dirty. Lizard every where. Reception very slow with customer service. Pool very dirty

sample_comments.title: There was no buggy for transportation. It should have hit a buffet, but they gave me a free 3 course meal. The food was
sample_comments.positives: Nothing
sample_comments.negatives: Did not get a series I needed

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Staff was very nice
sample_comments.negatives: No Beach, No TV Stations, Far away from everything, Few Activities

sample_comments.title: bad servives
sample_comments.text: after I went back to New Zealand, I checked my bank balance and found the hotel didnot refund my deposit and there was an unreasonable withdrawal in this resort. I sent email but no answer at all. This is my last night in Fiji. It is very bad ending.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Qianqian,

Thank you for taking time to share your feedback on your stay with us.
We are sorry for failing to meet your expectations. All constructive feedback received was shared with members of our Team, as we continue to focus in improving guest experience.

We hope you can consider staying with us in the near future.

Sincerely,
Anaseini Salosalo
for DoubleTree Family

sample_comments.title: Terrible! I have stayed here in all my visit to Fiji since 2003, but I won't come back here , ever!
sample_comments.positives: I booked for 2 adults and 2 children all online through booking.com and even included the children's ages. The package included breakfast for everyone. When checking in the gentleman said that one of my children doesn't have breakfast and had to pay extra. When I showed my booking, he said it doesn't matter I still have to pay, as its there policy. When I asked for the policy he declined to show. Therefore I didn't get any breakfast as I refused to pay for one extra. This was suppose to be a family holiday. The same gentleman checked us into a room facing directly the restaurant, when I went back and showed him that my booking was for beachfront, he mentioned with a smile that the room is the best one for beachfront. I advised him that I regularly come to Fiji and have stayed here many times and this is not the beachfront I had booked. I asked for the manager and this is when he changed my room to the correct one as he didn't want the manager involved. I really don't understand why he would check us into a room that I hadn't booked. Further to this I have photos of the property and the condition its in, which is very poor. The only great thing was the cleaning ladies, they did a great job, were humble and worked with a smile.
sample_comments.negatives: Checked us into the wrong room, extra charges when clearly I had paid for specific things such as breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Staff was very nice
sample_comments.negatives: No Beach, No TV Stations, Far away from everything, Few Activities

sample_comments.title: Terrible Service.
sample_comments.text: Terrible Service and you're asked to spend 100s of dollars for every little thing after paying for your room

sample_comments.title: If I go to Fiji again anytime in future, I will avoid Double Tree
sample_comments.positives: Overall the facility has good views, pool
sample_comments.negatives:
Extremely bad customer service. Each person says/promise differently and you have to follow up several times to get even small things done. They charge 3% on top of the rates advertised for paying by card, which is a surprise and I have to bare that additional 3% on my invoice as was not aware of this and didn't have enough cash while check-in. I understand that some business charge additional for using debit/credit card, but all other business usually charge 2% (2.5% max). It should be listed clearly to make people aware for this charges.
Food options in the restaurant is too bad, we tried so called "Indian" buffet, total rip-off, extremely costly, and worst food I tasted. It was no way "Indian" at all and they don't have enough quantity at the counter while refill is too slow keeping most of the counters empty quite frequently.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Waterfront
sample_comments.negatives: Shower corner was poorly patched with caulking- new layers over old layers. Misleading advertised photo showed a corner beachfront unit - we were not given the corner unit.

sample_comments.title: Very Very Very Poor Experience
sample_comments.text:
Very very poor experience and it's a toss the board, food, reception, house keeping 

When we got to the hotel side of the river, there was no porter, we had to walk with our luggage to the reception in the rain. 
Next they gave us the keys to the room at the reception and again there was no porter to take our luggage to the room, which we had to carry across the resort to the rooms on different levels. 
Once we got to the room, the room was still not ready. Although the house keeping staff were courteous.
Then we called room service 4 times and there was no answer in the end the reception told us they will call us and it took room service another 30 mins before they even called us. 
At the restaurant we were told the buffer would be good hover disappoint again the food was at best below average in case of lamb curry was all bones and no meat at all. 
Again the breakfast buffet was very average, hey but when you get below average, average is good isn't. 
At the time of checkout again we had to wait for 45 mins before a porter could come, not to mention we got calls from housekeeping as to when we will be leaving the room, well if you send the porter on time we would have left earlier.
So a really pathetic experience 
If you really care you will do something about it.

sample_comments.negatives: The service for a Hilton property was subpar. We didn't have anyone refresh our room (clean towels and pick up room service tray). We ordered room service and only received part of the order... charged for what we got, same at beach bar 2nd day.

sample_comments.title: Service no good, old amenities
sample_comments.text:
Front desk staff was not friendly, hard to believe they work in the front desk. 
Some staff was great tho, especially Sushmita from F&B. 
The rooms are old, we had bathroom sink leak, ac leak, and the fly screen door to the balcony was off the rail. 
Ants on the desk, tried to clean and keep all food away, still there the whole time when we were there. 
Very limited food options, only three restaurants you can go, two of them are not opened for lunch. 
From placing the order to getting the food on the table, it took forever. And whenever we asked for something, either never came or came in very late. 
Towels were not clean, you can easily find a ball of hair or brown/green stain on the fresh towels, again, asked for replacement and never came. 
We paid more than *** a night, which wasn't cheap, and everything else was additional cost. 
If you have too much money, don't care about how unorganized people are and like bad services, you should come, otherwise, not recommend Double tree Hilton and Fiji

sample_comments.title: Poor security
sample_comments.text:
Nice Hotel, but Poor Security

The hotel is nice, but my experience was ruined by a serious security issue. Someone broke into my room while I was sleeping, and there was a CCTV blind spot that left the incident unrecorded. The hotel took no responsibility or offered any resolution. I won't be staying here again due to these security concerns.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.positives: All of it - the warm and helpful staff, the beautuful hut accommodations, the AMAZING food. I just can't say enough. It was a wonderful place to visit!
sample_comments.negatives: The access into the pools could be better for those who are unsure on their feet - like handrails and smaller steps into the main pool area in more than one place.

sample_comments.title: Badly kept grounds and bed bugs
sample_comments.text:
I definitely got bitten by bed bugs at this place. And I emailed after my stay to request the hotel inspect the room they also didn't reply. 

I also felt that for a hilton resort, the grounds were not in very good condition and not well maintained. Some of the seating in the gardens were broken and look like no one could be bothered to repair them. The resort was also a little out of the way so you need to cab to get anywhere nice. Also no beach to swim in, in the resort - mainly surrounded by muddy swamp water. Only have a hotel pool. In terms of service, I also felt a number of the staff just didn't care. Things got done, but not very promptly or with great professionalism.

sample_comments.title: I would not stay here again if my life depended on it. It's a beach resort without a beach.
sample_comments.positives: Honestly, The only thing this resort was good for was its proximity to several Day trip's to Koroyanitu Forest and Falls, and a few others off site excursions.
sample_comments.negatives:
1) Staff stole money from my wife and I and didn't take responsibility for it.
2) There is no real nice beach on the property. the entire front of the photos is a like, there is a wall of oversized rocks to keep the rest of the island from eroding away, and so while it looks great, when you get there, There isn't any beach to sit on. and if you walk down towards the activity area which isn't long, the beach is not maintained and isn't pretty, but also not safe, there are broken glass bottles everywhere and all sorts of drift material just lying on the beach and the horses they use for the tours are just dedicating on the beach and they do not pick it up. 
3) Food was not good AT ALL. we had to be very strategic with food since most of it was not appetizing.
4) Facilities are Small. It has a great entrance via the little boat, but the pool facilities, the bar, the restaurants, - there was nothing to do and the facilities were falling apart, either not looked after, not maintained holes in the floor boards, shingles falling off the Villa's , ... it was borderline in disrepair. there was even a giant hole being covered up by a picture .. as if that would fix the problem.
5) Staff were not attentive and I'm not sure if it's just cultural, but they hardly ever provided water at meals, they would start one task and forget about it and it would be an hour at a meal before they might remember, it seemed as if small tasks were impossible to them like asking to fix some items in our rooms.
6) We felt like an inconvenience to the staff at all times. 
7) Drinks were terrible. it was like they were never properly trained to make any drinks, -- So I drank the Beer instead.

We made the best of it, had a laugh, but we had to leave site everyday for edible / quality food or drinks, things to do, and just to get a break from the place. Do not be deceived by the photos. 

The rooms were Adequate, at best.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Beachfront room.. beautiful. Exceeded expectations
sample_comments.negatives: The only way to get there is by boat but it was quick and complimentary

sample_comments.title: I am extremely disappointed with my stay at this hotel.
sample_comments.text:
The room was in an unacceptable condition, full of bugs, including large cockroaches and what appeared to be bed bugs. When I reported the issue to reception, the staff showed little concern and simply responded with "really? sorry" without taking any meaningful action. The second time I raised the issue, I was asked, "did the cleaner not come to your room?" which completely missed the point, as the problem was clearly not resolved. As a result, I have been bitten all over both of my legs during my stay.

I had booked a "special" birthday dinner package for around $300. I was told by three different staff members at the time of booking that this would include a bottle of wine or champagne. However, I only received a single glass of a drink. The food itself was no different from what you would get at their regular restaurant, which costs around $80+. This makes the $300 price completely unjustified.

Overall, this experience was extremely disappointing. Poor hygiene and misleading information about paid services made the stay unacceptable. I would strongly advise others not to book the "special" dinner package, as it is not worth the price. I will definitely not be booking this hotel again if I return to Fiji.

sample_comments.title: Very disappointing and overpriced
sample_comments.positives: Very friendly staff, quite nice grounds
sample_comments.negatives: My husband got very sick there from the food (diagnosed when we got home - probably unclean water and poorly cooked chicken) and they tried to use my credit card illegally but ANZ bank fortunately stopped the transaction and cancelled my card. In addition, the whole complex is very dated (45 years old) and needs refurbishing as does all the furniture. Stayed in a bure which was so dark with no overhead lighting at all. Not what you expect from a "Hilton". The breakfast buffet and the Christmas buffet were very ordinary. Plenty of variety but the quality is not there and not up to expected "western" standard. There is also a major problem with birds at the restaurant - they are a pest eating off unattended plates and pooping everywhere. The room servicing was disappointing as they never once replaced all the linen correctly and we had to ring to get the missing items. Also annoyed to have approx 5% public holiday added to the advertised $129 FJ price for Christmas buffet - felt deceptive not to include in the price as it was obviously on a public holiday. Would never stay there again.

We had a very early flight - we left at 5.30am but we were told that the golf carts were broken but we saw 2 parked in front of the reception. We had to push 4 big and heavy suitcases by ourselves which is quite far . Very dissappointed.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text:
本次入住南迪希尔顿逸林酒店的体验令人失望。酒店地理位置较为偏远，出行并不便利；同时，整体设施明显老旧，已无法匹配希尔顿品牌应有的标准，亟需全面翻新。

此外，员工整体缺乏工作热情，服务态度较为冷淡，缺乏主动性和应有的专业度。

尤其令人不满的是餐厅的安排问题。我们提前预订了餐厅泳池旁的桌位，但在到达用餐时却被告知没有泳池旁的位置，并被强行安排在餐厅中间的桌位。然而当时我们清楚地看到泳池边仍有多张桌位空置。在我们多次、强烈要求下，工作人员才勉强为我们更换了座位，整个过程令人非常不愉快。

Our stay at the DoubleTree by Hilton Nadi was disappointing. The hotel is located in a relatively remote area, making transportation inconvenient. In addition, the facilities are clearly outdated and no longer meet the standards expected of the Hilton brand. A comprehensive renovation is urgently needed.

The staff also appeared to lack enthusiasm and motivation, with service that felt passive and unwelcoming.

One particularly frustrating experience occurred at the restaurant. We had reserved a table by the pool in advance, but upon arrival, we were informed that no poolside tables were available and were instead placed at a table in the middle of the restaurant. This was despite the fact that several poolside tables were visibly unoccupied at the time. Only after we firmly insisted did the staff reluctantly change our seating, which made the entire dining experience unpleasant.

sample_comments.title: Not Impressed! Tavu Resturant Closed! Bad service
sample_comments.text: This was our fourth trip. Upon our last experience we were given a complimentary upgrade to the Kind Premium Bure. But the services remain very bad as usual. We were supposed to check in at 3pm arrived at 2.45pm and were made to wait for 30min even though the booking was in advance. No apologies by the hotel. When we arrived it was raining. Staffs did not offer umbrella, our bags were wet because they carried it in the rain. During dinner There was no rain and Tavu grill and Bar was closed and we were not notified. But they where serving same menu at the buffet side. My 3yr old does not like to eat in a crowded area. So we ordered room service. And was amazed ro see the charge of $7 for room delivery. When it was the resorts fault the restaurant was closed. Stubby beers were brought to us with no openers. Waiters did not come and ask for refills. Buggy not operational during check out. You have to walk a long way to the reception than to the jetty. Potter staffs not helpful at all.

sample_comments.title: Stay if you like waiting hours for your food. Place was clean though
sample_comments.negatives: They took a deposit when I checked in and was supposed to cancel the deposit on check out. Everything was paid for and they even ran my card to cancel the deposit but that amount is still being held on their end. I have contacted them multiple times and each time they deflect saying I need to contact my bank. Has nothing to do with my bank. They're holding my money and won't return it or won't look into it. I've checked out a whole month now so the 5-7 working days to process is BS.

sample_comments.title: Extremely overpriced stay.
sample_comments.text: We checked in for 4 nights and we had to ask for some towels from the second night as we didn't get them with the room clean. One day we had to ask 4 times but promises from room service were only a promise. I had to go to room service to collect them. Very plain but overpriced food. Breakfast was the same every day. The only place I have experienced where they charge $7 to deliver a room service order on top of the overpriced menu. We asked to cancel the breakfast as we were leaving at 4.30 a.m. on the last day, but the hotel refused and charged us for it. The sea is near by but there is no access to the sea as no accessible sandy beach. If you don't like hotel food, then it is a struggle to find a restaurant nearby without going to Denarau or the city. However, there were many nice staff with big smiles. Would never select

sample_comments.positives: The place has a great infinity pool for pictures, the pool is nice , and the rooms are large. There are oceans on both sides . The hosts were amazing, there was an authentic fijian dance when we arrived , and also we were given warm cookies that were delicious. Great hosts! There is also a market within the place that has some great souveniers.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. The rooms are NOT like the picture AT ALL! Nothing is similar. We took a beachfront room but had a room with a view while the pictures looked like it walks out into an ocean. The ocean that we could see was murky and dirty
2. We assumed the boat ride would be magical to an island, but no, it looks like a swamp and we also saw 2 frogs there. This made it rather dirty.
3. The place is infested with many insects. We also stayed at another hotel which was way cleaner 
4. Location is uncomfortably far from all activities, you cannot rent a car and most people won't pick you up from here for activities unless you pay them. This made it very hard for us for activities
5. Our door lock was broken and we had to get it fixed. The alacarte options for dinner has very few options, and since you're on the island, it makes it hard to go out and get anything else.
6. Breakfast isn't great - its average. The jelly and peanut butter is left open so kids were seen to mix them up with spoons (versus them having separate boxes that they'd be handed out in). We were expecting more options for breakfast, and indoor options that don't allow flies

sample_comments.title: Disspaointed
sample_comments.text: Our week-long stay at DoubleTree by Hilton Fiji - Sonaisali Island from June 14 to 21, 2025, was okay but fell short in several areas. The resort's food was a major letdown. Breakfast was subpar, and dinners, like our meal at Tavu Bar and Grill---three chicken dishes and one rib for $216 FJD---were burnt and overpriced, pushing us to dine off-resort. Other guests echo the sentiment of inconsistent, costly food (***, 2025). The lack of evening entertainment, like shows, made nights dull, sending us straight to our room after dinner. The resort itself feels dated and needs upgrades, from facilities to activities, which were scarce. Constantly taking pricey taxis to the marina was frustrating---a shuttle bus would be a game-changer. Our room, booked for four, only had cutlery and glasses for two, and housekeeping removed extras daily, requiring repeated requests. On the bright side, the staff were genuinely friendly and helpful, a highlight noted in reviews (***, 2024). The oceanfront setting was stunning, but it couldn't offset the issues. I'd rate the stay 2.5/5. With better food, more activities, and modern upgrades, this resort could shine, but it's not there yet.

sample_comments.title: Reasonable
sample_comments.text: Friendly staff the hotel is okay. but keep in mind it's on an island not much choice of food & the quality of food aint that great either. Taxi ride can be expensive they charge $65 Fijian non negotiable each way that's close to $45 Australian each way. no near restaurant with decent food either nearest restaurants are in Denarau Island for better options. DoubleTree is good if you looking to relax only.

sample_comments.title: Overall nice and relaxing stay, BUT
sample_comments.text:
The location is quite isolated so if you plan to do anything other then stay put at resort, then be prepared to spend another FJ $60-$70 for Taxi (min.), or hire a car. 
Tip: Try not to hire a taxi from resort its almost double the cost. I managed to find a local taxi driver and took his phone# and called him directly everytime I needed taxi. Do confirm the fare before beginning journey though.

Large pool at the resort is the main attraction and also the bar next to pool. It was great and our 3yo had a blast everyday at the pool, and so did we.

The Double king Bure were nice and big. The bathrooms were great as well, BUT we did got visits from 1-2 small local Geckos lizards couple of nights. The balcony was nice and big overlooking ocean.

The buffet dinners were quite expensive and for vegetarians they offered disc. price but there was hardly anything other then salads. The breakfast was mostly with same items everyday. Last day we had couple of more items added.

There were some staff members who went above and beyond to help while others had no clue what's happening.

Personally, one should only stay here as a getaway for 2-3 days, anything over that will be bit boring or will have to spend more $$ for travelling to anywhere else to do things other then being at the pool. And if you are vegetarian, then good luck eating at the resort.

sample_comments.text:
Stayed here on our last night in Fiji and wish we hadn't. After coming from a weeks stay at another amazing resort, this was disappointing. sample_comments.title: Loud - Very Loud - Music is loud upon arrival and never stops
sample_comments.text:
My wife and I love quiet, relaxed places and island life. Immediately upon exiting the taxi pop music (low-key Fijian music would be preferred if music is a must). It was was blaring throughout the entire compound, from the boat ramp that takes you across the river to the hotel, to the boat ramp on the other side to the check-in counter, and throughout the facilities. We could hear it in our rooms and never had a break from it in the restaurants or around the pool. It's exhausting. When we tried to walk further down the beach to find a quieter spot, we suddenly heard pop, pop, pop as paintball guns were being fired at targets on the beach. My god, really? 

We prefer to hear the ocean, the wind, and the birdlife when we're on vacation. 

Fortunately, we only booked one night and couldn't wait to depart. 

The staff is friendly but there's no personal connection like we found with the people at the smaller resorts on the islands not too far from the port. 

If you're looking to visit Fiji and have an authentic experience without drowning in noise or an environment that could be anywhere USA, don't stay at the Doubletree.

sample_comments.title: Not worth the money
sample_comments.text:
Pros: Great looking room, great view. Food was good. 
Cons: 1. There was a rat in our room. This is a massive hazard- especially since we have two kids in the room of which 1 crawls. We repeatedly tried calling the front desk but there was no answer. Finally when our food got delivered, we told the person delivering about the rat who immediately sent someone with Mortein. Not sure how Mortein helps with rats, but we did see rat poo near the sink (have photos if you like) indicating that the rat is probably a common visitor. The only person who asked about the rat after that was the person from the restaurant to whom we complained; no one else was bothered. This is unacceptable in such a big brand and frankly made us uncomfortable, particularly because we paid over $350 for a night for a room.
2. The front desk staff were run off their feet- you really need more staff. Every time we called the reception, it would take us multiple tries before we got connected through. Seeing the big queues, it is understandable that they could'nt attend phones, but this means that you need to have adequate staffing.
3. I paid to have a room with a check in time of 3PM. I arrived at the property at 4PM and my room was still not ready and had to wait. In fact, several others were also waiting for their room. This is pretty poor service, considering had I overstayed in my room, you would not have hesitated to charge me more. 
4. Extremely long waiting times for food to be delivered, especially considering that if you do not have dinner reservations, there is a long wait for that too.

All in all, I was rather disappointed with my stay at Doubletree primarily because of the rat and the slow service. Yous staff are lovely otherwise, probably rusty from having two years of downtime due to Covid, but the reason I pay a lot of money to stay is because I expect a brand like you to take care of such things. Certainly not worth the money I paid to stay.

Staff were friendly, breakfast was good. Some little things might help this resort - note for anyone staying - there are not anywhere near enough chairs / lounges. people were securing lounges first thing in the morning and there were constantly people walking around looking for places to sit.
sample_comments.response:
Bula Vinaka Jo,
Thank you for your feedback. We're glad you enjoyed the friendly service and breakfast. We appreciate your suggestions and will review them with our team to improve guest comfort and experience.
Warm regards,
Resort Management.
sample_comments.room_type: Double King Premium Ocean View Bure

sample_comments.title: Patched up roofs
sample_comments.text: Yes you read it correctly. I am not sure how this is a 4 star resort. When you can see roofs patched up with plastic sheets. Ceiling interior wood panels cracks are also visible. Ants and lizard visible in the room. If it was not for staff hospitality, I wouldn't have given 1 star.

sample_comments.title: Great Island stay
sample_comments.text: We absolutely loved our stay at DoubleTree Fiji! The ocean view was stunning, and the walk to our cabin---surrounded by trees and nature---made us feel truly connected to the island's beauty. From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel pampered and special. Everyone greeted us with warm "Bula Bula!" smiles that added to the charm. Even the boat transfer to the island felt like part of the adventure. A truly unforgettable experience!

sample_comments.title: Nice stay
sample_comments.text:
I really enjoyed our stay at this hotel.
It included a lot of nice facilities and room was so clean.
The one issue we had was the location - it's not very close to Nadi or Suva, so if you are joining a tour, I would recommend getting a transfer included.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Good hotel services can be better
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel in a great location and nice pool. Services can be better e.g they ran out of shower gel for the whole 6 day stay. Rooms also need a facelift.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: AC didn't work and they kept was waiting
sample_comments.text: The AC didn't work and they sent a guy to fix it but we wasn't able to fix it. They said they are fixing it and kept us waiting in the hot room. We waited for 7 hours! We then finally decided to ask for a change of room but that too with difficulty because their engineer kept saying the AC unit was fixed and the front desk was reluctant. We had to finally carry our heavy bags abd suitcases upstairs even though we said we were tired and just wanted to sleep in the room and keep our luggage downstairs but they didn't agree. So, that's my feedback and this was pur second time here.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Except food everything else is good
sample_comments.response:
Dear Charles,

First of all, apologies for the delay in responding to your review.
While we are glad that everything else was good, we are sorry that our food service has failed us. Please be assured that your constructive feedback has been considered and shared with Management Team. 

Sincerely,
Anaseini Salosalo for DoubleTree Family

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: We had a five-day family stay at DoubleTree. The rooms and facilities were clean and comfortable. It is a beautiful spot to watch the sunset and enjoy a cocktail by the pool. The downside did not have enough towels and consistency in replacing them when the rooms were serviced. At times we were left with one towel for the whole family. There weren't enough pool towels to accommodate the occupants at the resort. Pool towels were all gone by 11 am. The food took a long time to get to the tables, and was slightly overpriced.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Michelle,

Greetings and thank you so much for your amazing review!
We are happy that you thoroughly enjoyed your DoubleTree Fiji Holidays, apart from the poor replenishment of bath linen during your stay.

Sincerely,
Anaseini Salosalo for DoubleTree Family

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Staff very friendly. Paddle Boards, kayaks very old and needed maintenance. Staff doing best with what they had. Room excellent, restautant good value, however service very slow. Pool excellent, Good relaxing holiday
sample_comments.response:
Dear Clifford,

Greetings and thank you so much for your constructive feedback!
We are happy that you found the staff friendly, however with slow service.

We can assure you that On-the-Job Training to monitor efficiency in service is ongoing and great improvement noted. We hope you can consider returning to the Resort in the near future.

Sincerely,
Anaseini Salosalo for DoubleTree Family

sample_comments.title: Lovely stay but didn't worth the money, specially don't book through booking because they aren't responsive
sample_comments.positives: Outside was clean and comfy
sample_comments.negatives: The rooms were so dirty , lots of dust everywhere and you could see the dead insects around.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed
sample_comments.text:
It started from the car park area which was very swampy and was hard not to get the shoes soaked in muddy water.
We called for slippers which did not turn up till the 3rd call
Shower door had no rubber insulation and the water kept running out drenching the mat.
The buggy did not turn up upon request therefore we ended up walking in the rain to get to the lobby.
One of the days when we left to go out for sightseeing i called the housekeeping and requested for the room to be done requesting extra mat for the leaking shower door also hung the sign on the door for housekeeping but when we got back in the evening the room was still not done. we were so disappointed having no fresh towels as well for shower after a long day out. We had to call and wait till a housekeeper came and cleaned up at night.
One of the morning for the breakfast I took 2 hash brown one of which had a bacon clinging to it. being a vegetarian I felt disgusted and I threw it away but It put me off
Managed by Hilton we didn't expect these things to happen but it did along with few other things such as dirty beach, poor lighting on the walkway together with huge puddles of water and breakdown of transfer boat while waiting for transfer at night. 
We hope that the management looks into this and try to give better experience to the future guest.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Faiza,

Thank you for taking time to share your feedback on your stay with us.

sample_comments.title: A great family holiday, but the resort was tired and overpriced for what it offers
sample_comments.positives: Staff were great, very friendly and helpful. The rooms and facility were all very clean
sample_comments.negatives: Restaurants and bars close at 9.30pm which is crazy for a resort on an island. The restaurant choices are extremely limited, we ate in all three restaurants and the food was extremely average. The rooms and hotel as a whole, whilst clean, are dated and in need of an update. The air conditioning in 2 of our 3 rooms was not functioning properly, maintenance tried to fix them, but it wasnt possible, we are just glad it wasnt hotter at our time of visit.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing stay
sample_comments.text: The room was comfortable, staff are friendly. But the prices given for transport out of the hotel was different from what they previously mentioned.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The staff was really friendly and helpful. Everyday there was a good program organized regardless of the weather conditions.
sample_comments.negatives: The buffet was a bit pricey for what you get. The facilities were not really clean as we found several cockroaches in our room.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Rooms were neat and cosy. Pool was exceptional for my 4 year old. Just did not like the menu options and prices
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: a mixture of good and bad probably made better by the friendliness of all staff.
sample_comments.positives: After a verbal wind up the first night for poor restaurant service the word got around and the staff couln't have been nicer or more attentive
sample_comments.negatives: The floating pool barriers that prevented my swimming lenghts and my wife in her eighties could not access the swim up bar.

sample_comments.title: Travelling with family
sample_comments.text: We had an Ocean view king room. Lovely location and views, large room with balcony BUT paper thin walls!! First night woken at 3.30 am with neighbours packing up to check out!! The bure is NOT a stand alone. Next morning got woken at 6 am and the same for the next 4 mornings by a crying loud child. We did mention this to staff who are obviously aware of this problem. You can hear everything!! Staff are absolutely amazing, so very friendly and happy and very helpful. Great breakfast buffet selection, but most mornings hot food warm at most. They have a dinner theme night every night, went to the Butcher's one, ok, but again a lot of hot food was warm, so we cancelled the Island night fearing the seafood my not be hot. Main dinner restaurant not a large menu, I presume they put more emphasis on the theme nights, so our family travelling with us opted for room service which had a better selection. Lunch menu good but wait times easily an hour. The other smaller beach front restaurant, food was amazing. Lovely pool area with swim up bar. Nice resort to stay at and chill for a few days.

sample_comments.title: Very underwhelming
sample_comments.positives: The swim up bar
sample_comments.negatives: Food was not up to par with what we are used to at Fijian resorts. Parking for our rental was under a tree and so our rental was always dirty and covered in bird poop.

sample_comments.title: Great safe resort
sample_comments.text:
Wonderful location for families to spend time at. A little away from everything too, however. 
Don't bother getting cash as its a card only resort. 
Very fijian mentality about time so everything is very relaxed and slow. Not a bad thing for a tropical holiday. 
We did the horse trek which was interesting as 1 horse was a biter and the other 2 were very slow. No training or instructions so be aware when booking. 
Staff are so lovely, overall, and food was ok but not very adventurous.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The property was well maintained and the room was spacious
sample_comments.negatives: The service was underwhelming for a Hilton property. There was no drinking water in the rooms and we had to buy it for 9$ (Fiji dollar) a bottle from their store which is almost 325/- which is alot. It was my friend's birthday and I had requested them to setup something in the room while we stepped out even offering to pay for it but that wasn't done and later they sent a very basic tiny cake on reminding again and left it in the room. The room wasn't cleaned even though the sign was put outside and we had to call and remind them twice. But the most disappointing was the checkout in the morning. We had called and asked them the night before if we should complete checkout at night but we were told there are people at the reception 24*7 so we need not worry. There was no one available to help us with luggage when we called for it and our checkout took almost 30 mins. When you have a flight to catch this is not the service you expect. There is a lot that can be done to improve the service and keep the global standard for a brand especially seeing the rates for a room.

sample_comments.title: Peace and quiet stay away from ports
sample_comments.text: The hotel for our surprise was very beautiful and located away from the main port. You take a small boat to go across to the resort. Kids Cub with Eka was a massive hit with my son. There were few challenges regarding the Tavua grill restaurant, I won't recommend going there, the service is really slow and the food is below average with very high price. It's better to experience the buffet. Would definitely love to go back.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Nice and relaxing and that is what we went for
sample_comments.positives:
Good resort to relax- when you want to do nothing
Staff friendly and helpfull
sample_comments.negatives: No curtesy vehicle for pick up or delivering to events

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
Amazing staff, very friendly. Nice big rooms and beautiful pool over looking the beach. 

We stayed for two nights at the end of our stay so was a nice location away from everything if you don't want to leave once you arrive. 

Surprised you don't get wifi in your room and have to pay extra for this, also meaning tv was no internet either and offered a few channels. 

Restaurant food not amazing but had great views. 

Had a fenced in kids area with decent playground and sandpit

sample_comments.title: Will not consider for future holidays
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast is average, food is expensive and quality is not that great
sample_comments.negatives: Expensive no other place go out to , bathroom did not close for the whole stay, room items not allocated to all quests as per the room

sample_comments.title: Lovely Getaway
sample_comments.text: The facilities are nice, the rooms are beautiful (however the walls are a little thin so you can hear the neighbours very clearly). The food is a bit underwhelming and limited vegetarian options and comes out on "Fiji Time" as do the drinks unless you order directly from the bar. The buffets are great but a buffet breakfast everyday and then buffet dinner gets a bit much. Hope for nice weather otherwise the activities are a bit limited

sample_comments.title: Pros and Cons
sample_comments.text: It was our first time to Fiji and will certainly return. The staff were great and in particular Jonie should be given a promotion and raise, he was great. We found the buffet experience too expensive for what we could actually eat and we thought the in room menu was better than the ala carte restaurant. Ensure to download your own entertainment and bring books. Wi-fi is not free unless you are enrolled in Hilton Honors. The boat transport to the hotel is quite efficient and runs 24 hours. If you use the resort based flat fare taxi you will pay double over calling your own metered taxi. Roughly $30 to Denarau Island versus $60. The pool is great and kept tidy. This resort is typically less expensive than those on Denarau Island and worth the stay if you come prepared.

sample_comments.title: Fancy and overpriced
sample_comments.text: First of all it's a nice fancy place, reception staff friendly,other staff around including boat pilot,very arrogant,bad attitude.sewms like they doing a favour for us,,not realising if we do not book these accommodations,they won't even have a job,, all staff must LEARN MORE ABOUT CUSTOMER SERVICE.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel generally, but getting dated
sample_comments.text:
Let's start with the good things to report. 

POSITIVES: We loved the pool, the area around it, good cocktails at the pool bar, comfortable pool loungers. Food was great too! Lovely gardens and setting. 

I think in its heyday it would have been magnificent. It is showing many signs of wear & tear that needs addressing - eg. peeling paintwork, tiles missing from the pool. 

We paid quite a lot per night for an ocean glimpses, 'Ocean View Bure (cabin), but the cheaper 'Ocean Front Queen guest room' was better value for money with a great ocean view. My parents had booked this one. The Bure was roomy but that was the only thing going for it. The mattress was comfortable, but bounced with EVERY little movement that my partner made, and I honestly was jolted awake every time he moved. In the 2 nights we stayed I had very little sleep. I think because it was a spring mattress, but not sure. This hotel chooses to use a fitted sheet & a doona only so I was either boiling hot with it on, or freezing with it off. The air-conditioning with an additional 2 ceiling fans just didn't get the room cold enough to comfortably use a doona. A flat sheet would have solved this problem. Also, the toilet seat moved A LOT when used, like right off the toilet, and the complimentary body lotion pump was broken. The wardrobes were not deep enough to even fit a std cabin in when opened, so we couldn't close the wardrobe door - kinda annoying and a bad design. 

All in all, I expected a bit better of a Double Tree hotel.

sample_comments.title: Good Accommodations
sample_comments.text: Accommodations were great. Just wished there were more TV Channels instead of 8 or less. Only a few channels had sound. Hilton should look into this.
sample_comments.room_type: Double King Premium Ocean View Bure

sample_comments.title: It is kind of trap
sample_comments.text:
For 1-2 nights are good, but no more than that, the food, and water is way too expensive, the food is one of the worst, i ever eat in 4 star hotel, 
breakfast is ok but always about 20-30% some dish is runout or the pots
are empty, 
you can't get a taxi, if the hotel call the taxi, the taxi drive will charge 3-4 times more then meter rate, so you have no choice, you have pay 3-4 times more for the food, that you really don't like, or you have to pay taxi driver 110-120 dollars (AUD) to go eat out side, so basically you are trapped, the building is super old, even the toilet and shower doesn't have exhaust fan , so except some smells or leave the windows open, then deal with ants and small insects, 
The stuff are good

sample_comments.text:
We had a Great stay at DoubleTree Fiji for 7 days.
The hotel is close to the AirPort and completely schut off from the mainland. This offers serently however it is a bit boring after a few days. 
We stayed in a Ocean view bure, big large room with great terrace. 
The restaurant and bar is not really Cheap.

sample_comments.text: Awesome

sample_comments.title: Beautiful island getaway
sample_comments.text: We stayed as a couple for 9 days. Location- good 15 min from the town, it is a 3min ferry across available 24/7. The staff were exceptional, very interactive and helpful. This made our stay special. The pool was big enough with volley ball. Negatives- no real beach. We had a leaky roof after heavy rain, they did upgrade us to beach front which was lovely. Food - Asian night was not the best food, Saturday night was burger night! The rest of the nights were good and good value. Not much to watch on TV when it rains. It did rain 3 days. We did rent a car as taxis were so expensive. It was a lovely stay for our first visit and think lovely for families as lots of space on the island and activities like table tennis, volley ball and horse riding. For couples think Crowne Plaza would have been a better choice.

sample_comments.title: Great view from bure
sample_comments.text:
Over all, Had a very relaxing stay. 

Pros: quiet and far from city. Clean bure with comfortable bed and awesome view. Friendly staff. We had a late flight and was able to check out late. 

Cons: not much activities on site except pool. You'll have to book tours or take taxi out of resort area. Food selection was adequate with only 2 restaurants. The beach is murky due it's in a bay with black sand. You may still swim but at your risk. 

Suggestion, Kayaking or paddle boarding would be perfect for this area as the waters are calmer.

sample_comments.title: Short-stay Holiday
sample_comments.text: Exceptional.

sample_comments.title: Great
sample_comments.text: Great customer service and value for money
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Checking in just ruined our holiday
sample_comments.text:
Got to the resort at checked in there was no booking this just ruined the start of our holiday, receptionist was adamant. After showing confirmation they still said no booking until I demanded then to contact Agoda. I have stayed here many times but to be told I have no booking ruined they stay, finally they going the booking then to wait for a hour for our rooms made it worse. Breakfast was a 6/10 
6th time here will not return
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.text:
As couples with kids we prefer quiet and was pleasantly surprised 
Comfortable and lovely room 
Tip would be have more than one check in desk as we waited lots
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Weekend Stay
sample_comments.text: The hotel was amazing with good customer service and experience. I would definitely recommend this hotel as a go to place for holiday and relaxation.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: First Fiji Getawsy
sample_comments.text: Very relaxing, staff fantastic but Ocean View has numerous mosquitoes to kill. Upgraded to Premiere Ocean Front and lounge had flee's until it was sprayed underneath and controlled. Staff were very helpful and friendly which helped enormously.

sample_comments.title: Nice Stay
sample_comments.text:
The hotel take about 40 mins from the airport, there's no 'Uber' or anything similar in Fiji so you either get a taxi or rent a car which I highly recommended if you want to explore the island. 
Beautiful room, private complex and it's nice for relax. The facilities was not bad either, got nice pool, tennis court, gym and a little open play room.
Option of foods are quite good with different theme buffet every night. 
The only thing is the sea water right on the hotel not good for swimming so that was a pity as we were looking forward to it.
The view of Sunset was amazing from the hotel.
So overall it was ok for us.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel for a relaxing family holiday
sample_comments.text: This was our first time in Fiji, Doubletree is a lovely hotel and cheaper alternative to its cousin in Denarau Island. Location is a drive from the port but not too costly ($40-$50fjd). It has one pool that sits in front of the ocean, was never too busy but would be crowded if the hotel was full. Food options were limited if not opting for the costly evening themed buffets and expect to always wait over an hour if ordering from the a la cart menu. Staff were always warm and welcoming, great our daughter by name throughout the stay. Overall we had a great time, I'd suggest a couple of nights here is enough unless your doing lots of day trips to the islands that I highly recommend.
sample_comments.room_type: Double King Premium Ocean View Bure

sample_comments.title: Pleased with stay
sample_comments.text: Double Tree was a good stay. My kids were happy with stay too. The only thing i have to comment about is upon walking into the Bure bathroom area for the first time, we smelled a unpleasant odor emanating from the shower & sink drainage. On another note, some of the channels on the room TV didn't have any sound. When maintenance came by, they said they had no control over the sound issue, but said that the main station had control - i find that unsatisfactory.

sample_comments.title: Nice place for R&R
sample_comments.text: Staff are lovely here, and that was one of the key highlights. The pool is great, and the ocean views are very interesting. It suited our needs well as a young family needing to relax, and it was a quiet place to do this. However, for those expecting a pristine white sand beach, you will need to look elsewhere.
sample_comments.room_type: Double Queen Guest Room Beachfront W/ Balcony

sample_comments.title: Fijians Are always Happy!

sample_comments.title: Great stay at the Double Tree Sonaisali

Had a wonderful couple of days at the resort.

We loved staying in the bure, which was close to the water and convenient to see the sunset. Note that, although on an island, there's no beach on the island, but a rocky embankment. It's also a good distance away from Nadi city and Denarau, so factor that in.

The boat that connects the resort to the other side for access to taxis, tours etc. is almost constantly plying between the two sides and is good fun.

DoubleTree Family

sample_comments.title: Lovely family holiday
sample_comments.text:
Our stay at DoubleTree was exactly what we were after. It was relaxing, set in a lovely location, and had wonderful staff. 
The room, restaurant, and pool were clean and tidy.
Breakfast was solid and filled us up enough where we skipped lunch all week.
We mostly ate dinner at the buffet which was easy with the kids, and tasty. The staff were attentive without being overbearing. They remembered our drinks orders from night to night.
The quality of the buffet food was good, and as you would expect from a buffet. The quality of the food at à la carte dining was better, as you would also expect.
The location is lovely, though a little secluded. Perfect for a quiet getaway, but a little harder to use as a base for exploring Fiji.

sample_comments.title: Relaxation & beautiful all in 1

The pool is amazing and plenty of space for everyone. Plenty of things to do I really enjoyed the paint ball target shooting. Meals in the restaurant were perfect and the staff amazing. Would defiantly visit again.

sample_comments.title: great staff, nice location
sample_comments.text:
Nice resort. Great staff. Large rooms, comfortable bed(s) and quiet place. Fabulous sunsets :)
I very much enjoyed my stay. I did not have the breakfast included so I added the option at the resort for 35 fijean dollars/day. The breakfast offered quite a large variety of choices. The warm section was different every day of my stay. Great view on the ocean. The pool is small.
The resort is 3 km away from the closest village, the bus stop, a grocery shop and a couple of restaurants. 
30 minutes taxi drive from/to the airport. 40 Fijean dollars. With local transportation much longer but much cheaper too. 1 Fijean dollar from the airport to Nadi and another one from Nadi to the junction to the resort on Queens road. Then either a good 2.5 km walk or a taxi for 5 fijean dollars.
Absolutely feasible with a backpack.
The seaside at the resort is nothing special. A small beach. Dark sand. Muddy waters. For a nice beach I would recommend Natadola, 50 km south, close to Sigatoka.

There was a buggy to bring our luggages to our room although thankfully our room was very near to the central area. The room was very clean, toilet was excellent. The pool was nice and relatively clean, with a nice view of the sea and a beautiful sunset. Because of the location we had all three meals in the resort - lunch and dinner options included 2 restaurants with a variety of options. We spent most of our time in the resort as we were abit under the weather but felt it was a great place to unwind.

Not a lot of veggie/vegan eating options and the food prices are a little steep but a beautiful setting with lovely staff. If you need a place to relax this is it and it's much cheaper than the other major chains North of Nadi.

sample_comments.text: Wonderful resort with absolutely amazing staff. Our room was spacious, well-maintained, and offered stunning views of the sea. Themed dinners cater to various types of gastronomic needs and also Friday and Saturday night traditional dance . There are plenty of activities like horse riding and target shooting,and panitball that can be done .the pool was gorgeous, and the views were spectacular. They were always going above and beyond to take care of us.

sample_comments.title: Loved our stay at DoubleTree Hilton Fiji
sample_comments.text:
We had a great stay at DoubleTree Hilton - Sonaisali Island. Our kids loved the huge swimming pool, the delicious free cookies and fresh coconuts, all the activities at Kids Club (frog hunting, crab hunting, face painting etc.). We were also given complimentary bottles of water each day. We did the sunset cruise and the horse riding with an additional charge which was really nice. Guests can also choose to do the paddle boating or jet skiing. It's a beautiful place to relax and reset, in a quiet setting. We were offered a late check-out at 1pm with no additional charge. I just wish we could also enjoy the beach but the beach was dirty and the sand was dark. 
However, we didn't feel like we missed out too much as the resort itself offers everything and the staff are lovely, warm and welcoming and they went above and beyond to make our stay enjoyable. A special thank you to Ana from housekeeping who made our room so beautiful. And thank you to Anushka who always welcomed us with a smile each morning for our buffet breakfast.

sample_comments.negatives: Buffet, no value for money

sample_comments.title: Fiji Holiday
sample_comments.text: Courteous and professional friendly staff in the whole of the resort. The food and drink is good value for money. The activities around the Nadi area are well priced and transport and pickups we've used are well organised and timely. Will come again

sample_comments.title: Beautiful venue pool had an amazing view but customer service might need more work.
sample_comments.positives: The pool was really beautiful and they did offer a variety of activities. We did the horse riding with Samuel which was amazing. We felt so comfortable and was lots of fun doing the sunset ride on the beach. Big shout out to Kesha & Lizzy they were amazing, always greeting us and asking if she could help us with anything. Food was yummy!
sample_comments.negatives:
Unfortunately, while we were there, our Wi-Fi, TV and phone didn't work in our room and Wi-Fi at all. Which was not taken with any seriousness to the staff.

While the staff customer service while we were there was okay after leaving the resort asking for receipts/documents confirmations took over 10 days and had to follow up many times. Bit disappointing but the stay was enjoyable.

sample_comments.title: Another Great Getaway
sample_comments.text: Spent two nights with my children at the DoubleTree Resort and my children loved it. I had never experienced such lovely customer service as what we got at the Resort. The atmosphere is relaxing and safe for little children. The rooms are perfect. We stayed in two vilas and got the privacy we needed. Seafood buffet on Saturday night was so good. I would definitely visit this place again for that perfect escape.

sample_comments.title: Above average

sample_comments.negatives: Has hot water issue on the first day we arrived but it was fixed

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Very good pool, and pool bar is excellent. Friendly staff.

sample_comments.title: I didn't like sleeping in a hot room.
sample_comments.negatives: I stayed 2 nights in your ocean view rooms. Both nights the AC did not work as it was not cooling. Response time was excellent to get It fixed but was unable to fix it as my room still did not cool. One my last night I was given a standing fan. I'm an electrical engineer i know how to operate the controls of AC . Technician only came and checked the controls. Physical inspection was not done properly. 2 days o stayed in a hot room and paid thousands of dollars to stay in a hot room. Overall sleeping rating would be 1/10.

sample_comments.title: Lovely place
sample_comments.text: We had lovely experience in Double Tree. Staffs were lovely and good view with huge swimming pool. Good buffet breakfast and dinner. Only once the staff did not communicated well regarding the dinner menu at Vulani, only mentioned buffet and Tavi grill option. Rest almost all the staffs were very friendly and welcoming. Would recommend.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Pool area was nice..Comfortable beds. Good breakfast.
sample_comments.negatives: Hotel is run down. Needs a renovation. Wasn't worth the price. Security box in the room didn't work. TV worked for an hour and stopped. Phone wasn't connected- couldn't call reception. AC was very loud and made strange noises all night- hence little sleep. When I gave feedback to reception they were nice but just said ok.

sample_comments.title: Perfect slice of paradise
sample_comments.text:
We were three adults staying in an ocean front Bure. Very generous sized rooms, deck overlooking the sunset ocean. 

Comfortable beds with lovely linen, good pillows too!

Cannot express how fabulous, attentive, friendly and kind-hearted the staff are at the resort. Always a smile, ready to help and have a laugh. 

This is my 6th stay in Fiji, and DoubleTree Hilton has been my most favourite resort. 

Outdoor eating areas are really neat, food is good with plenty of variety. Buffet breakfast is extensive with its offerings. 

Pool area is smaller than some resorts, however it was never too busy. Swim up bar, and poolside service was awesome.
sample_comments.room_type: Double King Premium Ocean View Bure

sample_comments.positives: The breakfast is great and the staff are amazing
sample_comments.negatives: The location isn't ideal there is not much for a beach and it's hard to travel around outside of the excursions. The hotel doesn't offer much so you have to book with the travel company on site to do trips.
